Interface DRITextField<T>

All Superinterfaces:
DRIComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, DRIHyperLinkComponent, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
DRTextField
public interface DRITextField<T> extends DRIHyperLinkComponent

DRITextField interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca, Jan Moxter
